boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate telemetry service after prerequisite calibration evidence is attached to the activation packet?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on site and device type
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P requires exact device group, site, release condition match
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Calibration must match activation group/site before execution

final_answer: Source records show calibration CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B lab units at Site 18-L while activation targets production units at Site 18-P. STD-ACR-022-P requires exact match on group, site, and condition. Shared prefix is insufficient. Boundary remains open. Escalate for corrected calibration evidence before activation proceeds.
